texto: You could become paralyzed with worry about what might happen to your family, or if you hadn’t yet had children you could decide not to, as a sort of proactive damage control. Either way, you would be derailing your life voluntarily out of fear that it might become ruined by chance. Or you could pick up and move on. Those were the only choices.
explicacao: Citação de Nichole Bernier sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “You could become paralyzed with worry about what might happen to your family, or if you hadn’t ye…” articula familia, chance, fear em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como fear e move-on.
